name: Mutual Exclusion
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MutualExclusion ----
EXTENDS Naturals, TLC

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES state

(* State of each process: 1..N -> {"idle", "trying", "critical"} *)
TypeOK == /\ state \in [1..N -> {"idle", "trying", "critical"}]

Init == /\ state = [i \in 1..N |-> "idle"]

Next ==
  \/ \E i \in 1..N :
       /\ state[i] = "idle"
       /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "trying"]
  \/ \E i \in 1..N :
       /\ state[i] = "trying"
       /\ \A j \in 1..N : j # i => state[j] # "critical"
       /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "critical"]
  \/ \E i \in 1..N :
       /\ state[i] = "critical"
       /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "idle"]
  \/ /\ UNCHANGED state

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars
vars == <<state>>

====

name: Two-Phase Commit
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TwoPhaseCommit ----
EXTENDS Naturals, TLC

CONSTANTS N, Participants
VARIABLES finishedParticipants, messages, state, votes


\* Type invariant
TypeOK ==
    /\ state \in {"idle", "preparing", "committing", "aborting", "finished"}
    /\ votes \in [Participants -> {"yes", "no", "none"}]
    /\ messages \in [Participants \cup {"coordinator"} -> [Participants \cup {"coordinator"} -> {"Prepare", "VoteYes", "VoteNo", "Commit", "Abort"}]]
    /\ finishedParticipants \subseteq Participants

\* Initial state
Init ==
    /\ state = "idle"
    /\ votes = [p \in Participants |-> "none"]
    /\ messages = [s \in Participants \cup {"coordinator"} |-> [r \in Participants \cup {"coordinator"} |-> {}]]
    /\ finishedParticipants = {}

\* Helper to send a message
SendMsg(sender, receiver, msgType) ==
    messages' = [messages EXCEPT ![sender][receiver] = @ \cup {msgType}]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<state, votes, finishedParticipants>>

\* Helper to receive a message
RecvMsg(sender, receiver, msgType) ==
    /\ msgType \in messages[sender][receiver]
    /\ messages' = [messages EXCEPT ![sender][receiver] = @ \ {msgType}]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<state, votes, finishedParticipants>>

\* Coordinator actions
CoordinatorPrepare ==
    /\ state = "idle"
    /\ \E p \in Participants:
        /\ SendMsg("coordinator", p, "Prepare")
    /\ state' = "preparing"
    /\ UNCHANGED <<votes, finishedParticipants>>

CoordinatorCommit ==
    /\ state = "preparing"
    /\ \A p \in Participants: votes[p] = "yes"
    /\ \E p \in Participants:
        /\ SendMsg("coordinator", p, "Commit")
    /\ state' = "committing"
    /\ UNCHANGED <<votes, finishedParticipants>>

CoordinatorAbort ==
    /\ state = "preparing"
    /\ \A p \in Participants: votes[p] = "no"
    /\ \E p \in Participants:
        /\ SendMsg("coordinator", p, "Abort")
    /\ state' = "aborting"
    /\ UNCHANGED <<votes, finishedParticipants>>

CoordinatorFinish ==
    /\ state \in {"committing", "aborting"}
    /\ \A p \in Participants: p \in finishedParticipants
    /\ state' = "finished"
    /\ UNCHANGED <<votes, messages>>

\* Participant actions
ParticipantVoteYes ==
    /\ state = "preparing"
    /\ \E p \in Participants:
        /\ RecvMsg("coordinator", p, "Prepare")
        /\ SendMsg(p, "coordinator", "VoteYes")
        /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![p] = "yes"]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<state, finishedParticipants, messages>>

ParticipantVoteNo ==
    /\ state = "preparing"
    /\ \E p \in Participants:
        /\ RecvMsg("coordinator", p, "Prepare")
        /\ SendMsg(p, "coordinator", "VoteNo")
        /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![p] = "no"]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<state, finishedParticipants, messages>>

ParticipantCommit ==
    /\ state = "committing"
    /\ \E p \in Participants:
        /\ RecvMsg("coordinator", p, "Commit")
        /\ finishedParticipants' = finishedParticipants \cup {p}
    /\ UNCHANGED <<state, votes, messages>>

ParticipantAbort ==
    /\ state = "aborting"
    /\ \E p \in Participants:
        /\ RecvMsg("coordinator", p, "Abort")
        /\ finishedParticipants' = finishedParticipants \cup {p}
    /\ UNCHANGED <<state, votes, messages>>

\* Next-state relation
Next ==
    \/ CoordinatorPrepare
    \/ CoordinatorCommit
    \/ CoordinatorAbort
    \/ CoordinatorFinish
    \/ ParticipantVoteYes
    \/ ParticipantVoteNo
    \/ ParticipantCommit
    \/ ParticipantAbort
    \/ /\ UNCHANGED <<state, votes, messages, finishedParticipants>>  \* Termination disjunct

\* Specification
vars == <<state, votes, messages, finishedParticipants>>
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

====

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Naturals, TLC

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES forks, state

(* forks[i] = j means fork i is held by philosopher j (1..N)
   forks[i] = 0 means fork i is free *)
(* state[i] \in {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"} *)

vars == <<forks, state>>

(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK == 
    /\ forks \in 0..N \* N
    /\ state \in {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"} \* N

(* Initial state: all forks free, all philosophers thinking *)
Init == 
    /\ forks = <<0 \* N>>
    /\ state = <<"thinking" \* N>>

(* Helper predicates *)
left(i) == IF i = 1 THEN N ELSE i - 1
right(i) == IF i = N THEN 1 ELSE i + 1

forkFree(i) == forks[i] = 0
canEat(i) == forkFree(left(i)) /\ forkFree(right(i))

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == 
    \/ (* Philosopher i becomes hungry *)
       \E i \in 1..N :
           /\ state[i] = "thinking"
           /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "hungry"]
           /\ forks' = forks
    \/ (* Philosopher i starts eating if both forks free *)
       \E i \in 1..N :
           /\ state[i] = "hungry"
           /\ canEat(i)
           /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]
           /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![left(i)] = i, ![right(i)] = i]
    \/ (* Philosopher i puts down forks after eating *)
       \E i \in 1..N :
           /\ state[i] = "eating"
           /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]
           /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![left(i)] = 0, ![right(i)] = 0]
    \/ (* Termination disjunct to avoid deadlock *)
       /\ UNCHANGED vars

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Naturals, TLC

CONSTANTS N

VARIABLES num, flag

(* num[i] is the ticket number of process i (0..N-1)
   flag[i] is TRUE if process i is choosing a ticket *)
TypeOK == /\ num \in [0..N-1 -> 0..N]
          /\ flag \in [0..N-1 -> BOOLEAN]

Init == /\ num = [i \in 0..N-1 |-> 0]
        /\ flag = [i \in 0..N-1 |-> FALSE]

(* Helper to compute the maximum ticket number among all processes *)
maxNum == CHOOSE m \in 0..N : m = MAX { num[j] : j \in 0..N-1 }

(* Next action for process i *)
Next_i(i) ==
  /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
  /\ UNCHANGED <<num>>
  /\ UNCHANGED <<flag>>
  /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = maxNum + 1]
  /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]
  /\ UNCHANGED <<num>>

(* Entry section for process i *)
Entry_i(i) ==
  /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
  /\ UNCHANGED <<num>>
  /\ UNCHANGED <<flag>>
  /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = maxNum + 1]
  /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]
  /\ UNCHANGED <<num>>

(* Exit section for process i *)
Exit_i(i) ==
  /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = 0]
  /\ UNCHANGED <<flag>>

(* Next action: any process can perform entry or exit *)
Next ==
  \E i \in 0..N-1 :
    (Entry_i(i) \/ Exit_i(i))

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag>>

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFO ----
EXTENDS Naturals, TLC

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES head, tail, data

(* head and tail are indices into the circular buffer *)
(* data is an array of length K+1 storing the elements *)

vars == <<head, tail, data>>

(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK == /\ head \in 0..K
          /\ tail \in 0..K
          /\ data \in [0..K -> 0..K]  (* elements are integers 0..K for simplicity *)

(* Helper to compute next index in circular buffer *)
NextIdx(i) == IF i = K THEN 0 ELSE i + 1

(* Queue is empty when head = tail *)
Empty == head = tail

(* Queue is full when next index of tail equals head *)
Full == NextIdx(tail) = head

(* Producer action: enqueues value v *)
Producer(v) == /\ ~Full
               /\ data' = [data EXCEPT ![tail] = v]
               /\ tail' = NextIdx(tail)
               /\ head' = head

(* Consumer action: dequeues value v *)
Consumer(v) == /\ ~Empty
               /\ v = data[head]
               /\ head' = NextIdx(head)
               /\ tail' = tail

(* Termination disjunct to avoid deadlock *)
Terminate == /\ UNCHANGED vars

Init == /\ head = 0
        /\ tail = 0
        /\ data = [i \in 0..K |-> 0]

Next == Producer(v) \/ Consumer(v) \/ Terminate

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars /\ TypeOK

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftLeaderElection ----
EXTENDS Naturals, TLC

CONSTANTS N, Majority
VARIABLES currentTerm, serverId, state, votedFor


(* Enumerated types for states *)
StateEnum == {"Follower", "Candidate", "Leader"}

(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK ==
    /\ currentTerm \in 0..N
    /\ votedFor \in 0..N
    /\ state \in StateEnum
    /\ serverId \in 1..N

(* Initial state *)
Init ==
    /\ currentTerm = 0
    /\ votedFor = 0
    /\ state = "Follower"
    /\ serverId \in 1..N

(* Candidate election step *)
CandidateStep ==
    /\ state = "Follower"
    /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm + 1
    /\ votedFor' = serverId
    /\ state' = "Candidate"

(* Vote granted by this server to a candidate *)
VoteGranted ==
    /\ state = "Follower"
    /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
    /\ votedFor' = serverId
    /\ state' = "Follower"

(* Vote denied by this server to a candidate *)
VoteDenied ==
    /\ state = "Follower"
    /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
    /\ votedFor' = votedFor
    /\ state' = "Follower"

(* Transition to Leader after majority *)
LeaderStep ==
    /\ state = "Candidate"
    /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
    /\ votedFor' = votedFor
    /\ state' = "Leader"

(* Termination disjunct to avoid deadlock *)
Terminating ==
    /\ UNCHANGED <<currentTerm, votedFor, state, serverId>>

(* Next-state relation *)
Next ==
    \/ CandidateStep
    \/ VoteGranted
    \/ VoteDenied
    \/ LeaderStep
    \/ Terminating

(* Spec *)
vars == <<currentTerm, votedFor, state, serverId>>
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Naturals, TLC

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES readers, writer_active

(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK == /\ readers \in 0..N
          /\ writer_active \in BOOLEAN

(* Initial state: no readers, no writer *)
Init == /\ readers = 0
        /\ writer_active = FALSE

(* Reader actions *)
ReaderEnter == /\ writer_active = FALSE
              /\ readers' = readers + 1
              /\ UNCHANGED writer_active

ReaderExit == /\ readers > 0
             /\ readers' = readers - 1
             /\ UNCHANGED writer_active

(* Writer actions *)
WriterEnter == /\ writer_active = FALSE
              /\ readers = 0
              /\ writer_active' = TRUE
              /\ UNCHANGED readers

WriterExit == /\ writer_active = TRUE
             /\ writer_active' = FALSE
             /\ UNCHANGED readers

(* Termination disjunct to avoid deadlock *)
Terminating == /\ UNCHANGED <<readers, writer_active>>

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == \/ ReaderEnter
       \/ ReaderExit
       \/ WriterEnter
       \/ WriterExit
       \/ Terminating

(* Specification *)
vars == <<readers, writer_active>>
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

name: Distributed Snapshot (Chandy-Lamport)
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ChandyLamportSnapshot ----
EXTENDS Naturals, TLC

CONSTANTS N, Channels
VARIABLES channelState, localState, markerReceived, markerSent, state


(* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *)
(* Type constraints for all variables *)
TypeOK ==
    /\ state \in [1..N -> {"idle", "recording", "finished"}]
    /\ localState \in [1..N -> 0..N]
    /\ channelState \in [Channels -> 0..N]
    /\ markerSent \in [Channels -> BOOLEAN]
    /\ markerReceived \in [Channels -> BOOLEAN]

(* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *)
(* Initial state: all processes idle, no markers sent or received,
   local and channel values set to 0 *)
Init ==
    /\ state = [p \in 1..N |-> "idle"]
    /\ localState = [p \in 1..N |-> 0]
    /\ channelState = [c \in Channels |-> 0]
    /\ markerSent = [c \in Channels |-> FALSE]
    /\ markerReceived = [c \in Channels |-> FALSE]

(* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *)
(* Helper: all markers for a process have been received *)
AllMarkersReceived(p) ==
    /\ \A c \in Channels : (c[2] = p) => markerReceived[c]

(* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *)
(* Helper: send marker on all outgoing channels of a process *)
SendMarkers(p) ==
    /\ \E c \in Channels : (c[1] = p) /\ markerSent[c] = FALSE
    /\ \E c \in Channels : (c[1] = p) => markerSent'[c] = TRUE
    /\ UNCHANGED << state, localState, channelState, markerReceived >>

(* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *)
(* Helper: receive a marker on a channel *)
ReceiveMarker(c) ==
    /\ markerReceived[c] = FALSE
    /\ markerReceived' = [markerReceived EXCEPT ![c] = TRUE]
    /\ UNCHANGED << state, localState, channelState, markerSent >>

(* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *)
(* Helper: process receives a normal message on a channel *)
ReceiveMessage(c, msg) ==
    /\ markerReceived[c] = TRUE
    /\ channelState'[c] = msg
    /\ UNCHANGED << state, localState, markerSent, markerReceived >>

(* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *)
(* Helper: process records its local state and starts recording *)
RecordLocalState(p) ==
    /\ state[p] = "idle"
    /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "recording"]
    /\ localState' = [localState EXCEPT ![p] = localState[p] + 1] \* example update
    /\ UNCHANGED << channelState, markerSent, markerReceived >>

(* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *)
(* Helper: process finishes recording after all markers received *)
FinishRecording(p) ==
    /\ state[p] = "recording"
    /\ AllMarkersReceived(p)
    /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "finished"]
    /\ UNCHANGED << localState, channelState, markerSent, markerReceived >>

(* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *)
(* Next-state relation: disjunction of all possible actions *)
Next ==
    \/ \E p \in 1..N : RecordLocalState(p)
    \/ \E p \in 1..N : FinishRecording(p)
    \/ \E c \in Channels : ReceiveMarker(c)
    \/ \E c \in Channels : ReceiveMessage(c, channelState[c] + 1) \* example message
    \/ \E p \in 1..N : SendMarkers(p)
    \/ Terminating

(* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *)
(* Terminating disjunct to avoid deadlock when all processes finished *)
Terminating ==
    /\ \A p \in 1..N : state[p] = "finished"
    /\ UNCHANGED vars

(* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *)
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

====

name: Token Ring
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TokenRing ----
EXTENDS Naturals, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLE token

vars == <<token>>

Init == /\ token \in 1..N

Next == 
  /\ token' \in 1..N
  /\ token' = IF token = N THEN 1 ELSE token + 1

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

TypeOK == /\ token \in 1..N

name: Simple Key-Value Store
generated_spec:
---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Naturals, TLC

CONSTANTS Keys, Values, NULL
VARIABLES nextOpId, pending, store


(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK ==
    /\ store \in [Keys -> Values]
    /\ pending \in [Nat -> [opId: Nat, type: {"Put", "Get"}, key: Keys, value: Values \cup {"_"}]]
    /\ nextOpId \in Nat

(* Initial state *)
Init ==
    /\ store = [k \in Keys |-> VALUES[0]]
    /\ pending = [i \in 1..0 |-> [opId |-> 0, type |-> "Put", key |-> NULL, value |-> NULL]]
    /\ nextOpId = 1

(* Helper to generate a new operation ID *)
NewOpId ==
    nextOpId' = nextOpId + 1

(* Helper to add a new operation to pending *)
AddOp(op) ==
    pending' = [pending EXCEPT ![nextOpId] = op]
    /\ NewOpId

(* Helper to remove an operation from pending *)
RemoveOp(id) ==
    pending' = [pending EXCEPT ![id] = @]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<store, nextOpId>>

(* Put operation *)
Put(k, v) ==
    /\ k \in Keys
    /\ v \in Values
    /\ AddOp([opId |-> nextOpId, type |-> "Put", key |-> k, value |-> v])

(* Get operation *)
Get(k) ==
    /\ k \in Keys
    /\ AddOp([opId |-> nextOpId, type |-> "Get", key |-> k, value |-> "_"])

(* Resolve a pending Put: update store *)
ResolvePut(id) ==
    /\ pending[id] \in [opId: Nat, type: {"Put"}, key: Keys, value: Values]
    /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![pending[id].key] = pending[id].value]
    /\ RemoveOp(id)

(* Resolve a pending Get: return current value *)
ResolveGet(id) ==
    /\ pending[id] \in [opId: Nat, type: {"Get"}, key: Keys, value: {"_"}]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<store>>
    /\ RemoveOp(id)

(* Next-state relation *)
Next ==
    \/ \E k \in Keys : \E v \in Values : Put(k, v)
    \/ \E k \in Keys : Get(k)
    \/ \E id \in DOMAIN pending :
        \/ ResolvePut(id)
        \/ ResolveGet(id)
    \/ UNCHANGED <<store, pending, nextOpId>>  \* Termination disjunct

Spec ==
    Init /\ [][Next]_<<store, pending, nextOpId>> /\ TypeOK

====

name: Paxos Single-Decree
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Paxos ----
EXTENDS Naturals, FiniteSets, TLC

CONSTANTS N, M, Vals, None

(* Variables *)
VARIABLES acceptors, proposers, chosen, accepted, ballot, phase, promised, value

(* Types *)
TypeOK == 
    /\ acceptors \in [1..N -> [ballot: 0..N, promised: BOOLEAN, accepted: BOOLEAN, value: Vals]]
    /\ proposers \in [1..M -> [ballot: 0..N, phase: {"prepare", "accept"}, promised: BOOLEAN, accepted: BOOLEAN, value: Vals]]
    /\ chosen \in Vals \cup {None}

(* Initial state *)
Init == 
    /\ acceptors = [i \in 1..N |-> [ballot |-> 0, promised |-> FALSE, accepted |-> FALSE, value |-> None]]
    /\ proposers = [j \in 1..M |-> [ballot |-> 0, phase |-> "prepare", promised |-> FALSE, accepted |-> FALSE, value |-> None]]
    /\ chosen = None

(* Helper predicates *)
AllPromisesMade == 
    /\ \A i \in 1..N : acceptors[i].promised = TRUE

AllAccepted == 
    /\ \A i \in 1..N : acceptors[i].accepted = TRUE

HighestAcceptedValue == 
    LET vals == {acceptors[i].value : i \in 1..N /\ acceptors[i].accepted = TRUE}
    IN IF vals = {} THEN None ELSE CHOOSE v \in vals : TRUE

(* Next state *)
Next == 
    \/ (* Prepare phase by a proposer *)
       \E j \in 1..M :
          /\ proposers[j].phase = "prepare"
          /\ proposers[j].ballot' = proposers[j].ballot + 1
          /\ proposers[j].phase' = "prepare"
          /\ proposers[j].promised' = proposers[j].promised
          /\ proposers[j].accepted' = proposers[j].accepted
          /\ proposers[j].value' = proposers[j].value
          /\ acceptors' = [i \in 1..N |-> 

                    [acceptors[i] EXCEPT !.ballot = proposers[j].ballot',
                     !.promised = TRUE,
                     !.accepted = acceptors[i].accepted,
                     !.value = acceptors[i].value]

          /\ proposers' = [k \in 1..M |-> IF k = j THEN proposers'[j] ELSE proposers[k]]
          /\ chosen' = chosen
    \/ (* Accept phase by a proposer *)
       \E j \in 1..M :
          /\ proposers[j].phase = "accept"
          /\ proposers[j].ballot' = proposers[j].ballot
          /\ proposers[j].phase' = "accept"
          /\ proposers[j].promised' = proposers[j].promised
          /\ proposers[j].accepted' = proposers[j].accepted
          /\ proposers[j].value' = proposers[j].value
          /\ acceptors' = [i \in 1..N |-> 

                    [acceptors[i] EXCEPT !.accepted = TRUE,
                     !.value = proposers[j].value]

          /\ proposers' = [k \in 1..M |-> IF k = j THEN proposers'[j] ELSE proposers[k]]
          /\ chosen' = chosen
    \/ (* Once all acceptors have accepted, set chosen *)
       /\ AllAccepted
       /\ chosen' = HighestAcceptedValue
       /\ acceptors' = acceptors
       /\ proposers' = proposers
    \/ (* Termination disjunct to avoid deadlock *)
       /\ UNCHANGED <<acceptors, proposers, chosen>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<acceptors, proposers, chosen>>

====

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE FileTransfer ----
EXTENDS Naturals, TLC

CONSTANTS MAX_RETRIES, CHUNK_SIZE, FILE_SIZE
VARIABLES ackedChunks, channelLoss, currentChunk, finished, retransmitCount, sentChunks


(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK ==
    /\ sentChunks \in <<>> \/ (sentChunks \in <<1..FILE_SIZE>>)
    /\ retransmitCount \in 0..MAX_RETRIES
    /\ currentChunk \in 0..FILE_SIZE
    /\ ackedChunks \subseteq 1..FILE_SIZE
    /\ channelLoss \in BOOLEAN
    /\ finished \in BOOLEAN

(* Initial state *)
Init ==
    /\ sentChunks = <<>>
    /\ retransmitCount = 0
    /\ currentChunk = 1
    /\ ackedChunks = {}
    /\ channelLoss = FALSE
    /\ finished = FALSE

(* Action: send a chunk *)
SendChunk ==
    /\ currentChunk <= FILE_SIZE
    /\ channelLoss = FALSE
    /\ sentChunks' = Append(sentChunks, currentChunk)
    /\ retransmitCount' = 0
    /\ currentChunk' = currentChunk + 1
    /\ UNCHANGED <<ackedChunks, channelLoss, finished>>

(* Action: retransmit a chunk *)
Retransmit ==
    /\ currentChunk <= FILE_SIZE
    /\ channelLoss = FALSE
    /\ retransmitCount' = retransmitCount + 1
    /\ sentChunks' = Append(sentChunks, currentChunk)
    /\ UNCHANGED <<ackedChunks, currentChunk, channelLoss, finished>>

(* Action: message loss *)
MessageLoss ==
    /\ channelLoss' = TRUE
    /\ UNCHANGED <<sentChunks, retransmitCount, currentChunk, ackedChunks, finished>>

(* Action: receive ACK for a chunk *)
ReceiveAck ==
    /\ currentChunk - 1 \in ackedChunks
    /\ ackedChunks' = ackedChunks \cup {currentChunk - 1}
    /\ UNCHANGED <<sentChunks, retransmitCount, currentChunk, channelLoss, finished>>

(* Action: finish transfer *)
Finish ==
    /\ currentChunk > FILE_SIZE
    /\ finished' = TRUE
    /\ UNCHANGED <<sentChunks, retransmitCount, ackedChunks, channelLoss>>

(* Termination disjunct to avoid deadlock *)
Terminate ==
    /\ finished
    /\ UNCHANGED <<sentChunks, retransmitCount, currentChunk, ackedChunks, channelLoss>>

(* Next-state relation *)
Next ==
    \/ SendChunk
    \/ Retransmit
    \/ MessageLoss
    \/ ReceiveAck
    \/ Finish
    \/ Terminate

(* Specification *)
vars == <<sentChunks, retransmitCount, currentChunk, ackedChunks, channelLoss, finished>>
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

====

name: Transaction Isolation (Snapshot Isolation)
generated_spec:
---- MODULE SnapshotIsolation ----
EXTENDS Naturals, TLC

CONSTANTS TxnIds, DataItems, Values
VARIABLES activeTxns, data, snapshot, t, txnState, writeSet


(* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *)
(* Type constraints *)
TypeOK ==
    /\ data \in [DataItems -> Values]
    /\ snapshot \in [TxnIds -> [DataItems -> Values]]
    /\ txnState \in [TxnIds -> {"idle", "begin", "committed", "aborted"}]
    /\ writeSet \in [TxnIds -> [DataItems -> Values]]
    /\ activeTxns \in SUBSET TxnIds

(* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *)
(* Initial state *)
Init ==
    /\ data = [d \in DataItems |-> VALUES[0]]          \* All data items start with value 0
    /\ snapshot = [t \in TxnIds |-> [d \in DataItems |-> VALUES[0]]]
    /\ txnState = [t \in TxnIds |-> "idle"]
    /\ writeSet = [t \in TxnIds |-> [d \in DataItems |-> VALUES[0]]]
    /\ activeTxns = {}

(* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *)
(* Transaction actions *)

BeginTxn(t) ==
    /\ t \in TxnIds
    /\ txnState[t] = "idle"
    /\ txnState' = [txnState EXCEPT ![t] = "begin"]
    /\ snapshot' = [snapshot EXCEPT ![t] = data]
    /\ writeSet' = [writeSet EXCEPT ![t] = [d \in DataItems |-> VALUES[0]]]
    /\ activeTxns' = activeTxns \cup {t}
    /\ UNCHANGED <<data, txnState, snapshot, writeSet, activeTxns>>

CommitTxn(t) ==
    /\ t \in TxnIds
    /\ txnState[t] = "begin"
    /\ \A d \in DataItems :
          \A t' \in activeTxns \setminus {t} :
              writeSet[t'][d] = snapshot[t][d]
    /\ data' = [d \in DataItems |-> writeSet[t][d]]
    /\ txnState' = [txnState EXCEPT ![t] = "committed"]
    /\ activeTxns' = activeTxns \setminus {t}
    /\ UNCHANGED <<snapshot, writeSet>>

AbortTxn(t) ==
    /\ t \in TxnIds
    /\ txnState[t] = "begin"
    /\ txnState' = [txnState EXCEPT ![t] = "aborted"]
    /\ activeTxns' = activeTxns \setminus {t}
    /\ UNCHANGED <<data, snapshot, writeSet>>

(* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *)
(* Next-state relation *)
Next ==
    \E t \in TxnIds :
        \/ BeginTxn(t)
        \/ CommitTxn(t)
        \/ AbortTxn(t)
    \/ Terminating

(* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *)
(* Termination disjunct to avoid deadlock *)
Terminating ==
    /\ UNCHANGED <<data, snapshot, txnState, writeSet, activeTxns>>

(* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *)
(* Specification *)
Spec ==
    Init /\ [][Next]_<<data, snapshot, txnState, writeSet, activeTxns>>

name: Clock Synchronisation
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ClockSync ----
EXTENDS Naturals, TLC

CONSTANTS N, Epsilon, MaxDrift
VARIABLES clocks, node, offsets, round


(* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *)
(* Type invariant: all variables are finite and well-typed. *)
TypeOK ==
    /\ clocks \in [1..N -> 0..1000]
    /\ offsets \in [1..N -> -MaxDrift..MaxDrift]
    /\ round \in 0..1000

(* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *)
(* Initial state: all clocks start at 0, offsets are random within bounds. *)
Init ==
    /\ clocks = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
    /\ offsets = [i \in 1..N |-> RandomOffset]
    /\ round = 0

RandomOffset ==
    \* For TLC we need a concrete value; use 0 as a placeholder.
    0

(* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *)
(* One round of drift: each node's clock increases by 1 + its offset. *)
Drift ==
    /\ clocks' = [i \in 1..N |-> clocks[i] + 1 + offsets[i]]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<offsets, round>>

(* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *)
(* Synchronisation step: all nodes set their clocks to the average of all clocks. *)
Sync ==
    /\ let avg = (SUM i \in 1..N : clocks[i]) \div N in
       /\ clocks' = [i \in 1..N |-> avg]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<offsets, round>>

(* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *)
(* Next-state relation: either drift or sync, or terminate. *)
Next ==
    \/ Drift
    \/ Sync
    \/ Terminating

(* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *)
(* Termination condition: after a round, all clocks are within epsilon. *)
Terminating ==
    /\ round >= 1
    /\ \A i, j \in 1..N : Abs(clocks[i] - clocks[j]) <= Epsilon
    /\ UNCHANGED vars

Abs(x) == IF x >= 0 THEN x ELSE -x

(* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *)
(* Specification: initial state and always next. *)
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

name: Peterson's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Peterson ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences

CONSTANTS N
ASSUME N = 2

VARIABLES flag, turn, 0, 1

(* flag is a sequence of booleans indexed 0..1 *)
(* turn is an integer 0..1 *)

vars == <<flag, turn>>

Init ==
    /\ flag = <<FALSE, FALSE>>
    /\ turn = 0

(* Process 0's actions *)
P0Entry ==
    /\ flag[0] = FALSE
    /\ flag' = <<TRUE, flag[1]>>
    /\ turn' = 1
    /\ UNCHANGED turn

P0Exit ==
    /\ flag[0] = TRUE
    /\ flag' = <<FALSE, flag[1]>>
    /\ UNCHANGED turn

(* Process 1's actions *)
P1Entry ==
    /\ flag[1] = FALSE
    /\ flag' = <<flag[0], TRUE>>
    /\ turn' = 0
    /\ UNCHANGED turn

P1Exit ==
    /\ flag[1] = TRUE
    /\ flag' = <<flag[0], FALSE>>
    /\ UNCHANGED turn

(* Mutual exclusion invariant *)
TypeOK ==
    /\ flag \in <<FALSE, TRUE>, <<FALSE, TRUE>>
    /\ turn \in 0..1

Next ==
    \/ P0Entry
    \/ P0Exit
    \/ P1Entry
    \/ P1Exit
    \/ /\ UNCHANGED <<flag, turn>>  (* Terminating disjunct *)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

name: Gossip Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE GossipProtocol ----
EXTENDS Naturals, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Update

VARIABLES infected, round

(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK == /\ infected \in SUBSET 1..N
          /\ round \in 0..N

(* Initial state: no node infected, round 0 *)
Init == /\ infected = {}
          /\ round = 0

(* Each round, every infected node sends the update to all nodes.
   All nodes that receive the update become infected in the next round. *)
Next == 
  /\ round' = round + 1
  /\ infected' = infected \cup 1..N
  /\ UNCHANGED <<>>

(* Termination disjunct to avoid deadlock when all nodes are infected *)
Next == 
  \/ /\ round' = round + 1
      /\ infected' = infected \cup 1..N
      /\ UNCHANGED <<>>
  \/ /\ infected = 1..N
      /\ UNCHANGED <<infected, round>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<infected, round>>

name: Simple Allocator
generated_spec:
---- MODULE PageAllocator ----
EXTENDS Naturals, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Clients, Pages
ASSUME N \in 0..100
ASSUME Clients \subseteq 0..100
ASSUME Pages \subseteq 0..N

VARIABLES free, allocated

(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK == 
    /\ free \in SUBSET Pages
    /\ allocated \in [Clients -> SUBSET Pages]
    /\ \A c \in Clients: allocated[c] \subseteq Pages
    /\ \A c \in Clients: allocated[c] \subseteq free \cup Pages
    /\ \A c1, c2 \in Clients: c1 # c2 => allocated[c1] # allocated[c2]
    /\ free = Pages \setminus (\cup_{c \in Clients} allocated[c])

(* Initial state: all pages are free, no client has pages *)
Init == 
    /\ free = Pages
    /\ allocated = [c \in Clients |-> {}]

(* Allocate a page to a client *)
Allocate(c, p) == 
    /\ c \in Clients
    /\ p \in free
    /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \union {p}]
    /\ free' = free \ {p}
    /\ UNCHANGED <<>>

(* Release a page from a client *)
Release(c, p) == 
    /\ c \in Clients
    /\ p \in allocated[c]
    /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \setminus {p}]
    /\ free' = free \cup {p}
    /\ UNCHANGED <<>>

(* Next state: either allocate, release, or stay *)
Next == 
    \E c \in Clients : \E p \in Pages :
        (Allocate(c, p) \/ Release(c, p))
    \/ UNCHANGED <<free, allocated>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<free, allocated>>

name: Publish-Subscribe Broker
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Broker ----
EXTENDS Naturals, TLC

CONSTANTS Topics, Subscribers, Publishers, MaxMsg, MaxMsgSize
VARIABLES delivered, msgIndex, msgQueue, reg


(* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *)
(* Type constraints for all variables *)
TypeOK ==
    /\ reg \in [Topics -> SUBSET Subscribers]
    /\ msgQueue \in [Topics -> Seq(0..MaxMsgSize)]
    /\ msgIndex \in [Topics -> 0..MaxMsg]
    /\ delivered \in [Topics -> [Subscribers -> SUBSET 0..MaxMsg]]

(* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *)
(* Initial state *)
Init ==
    /\ reg = [t \in Topics |-> {}]
    /\ msgQueue = [t \in Topics |-> <<>>]
    /\ msgIndex = [t \in Topics |-> 0]
    /\ delivered = [t \in Topics |-> [s \in Subscribers |-> {}]]

(* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *)
(* Register a subscriber to a topic *)
Register(sub, topic) ==
    /\ sub \in Subscribers
    /\ topic \in Topics
    /\ reg[topic] = reg[topic] \cup {sub}

(* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *)
(* Unregister a subscriber from a topic *)
Unregister(sub, topic) ==
    /\ sub \in Subscribers
    /\ topic \in Topics
    /\ reg[topic] = reg[topic] \ {sub}

(* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *)
(* Publisher posts a new message to a topic *)
Post(pub, topic, msg) ==
    /\ pub \in Publishers
    /\ topic \in Topics
    /\ msg \in 0..MaxMsgSize
    /\ msgQueue[topic] = Append(msgQueue[topic], msg)

(* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *)
(* Deliver the next message in the queue to all registered subscribers *)
Deliver(topic) ==
    /\ topic \in Topics
    /\ msgIndex[topic] < Len(msgQueue[topic])
    /\ LET msg == msgQueue[topic][msgIndex[topic] + 1] IN
       /\ delivered[topic] = [s \in Subscribers |

                                   delivered[topic][s] \cup {msg}

                                   delivered[topic][s]]
       /\ msgIndex' = [t \in Topics |
                       IF t = topic THEN msgIndex[t] + 1 ELSE msgIndex[t]]
       /\ UNCHANGED <<reg, msgQueue, delivered>>

(* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *)
(* Termination disjunct to avoid deadlock when no actions are enabled *)
Terminating ==
    /\ UNCHANGED <<reg, msgQueue, msgIndex, delivered>>

(* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *)
(* Next-state relation *)
Next ==
    \/ \E sub \in Subscribers : \E topic \in Topics :
           Register(sub, topic)
    \/ \E sub \in Subscribers : \E topic \in Topics :
           Unregister(sub, topic)
    \/ \E pub \in Publishers : \E topic \in Topics : \E msg \in 0..MaxMsgSize :
           Post(pub, topic, msg)
    \/ \E topic \in Topics:
           Deliver(topic)
    \/ Terminating

(* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *)
(* Specification *)
vars == <<reg, msgQueue, msgIndex, delivered>>
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

name: Dekker's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Dekker ----
EXTENDS Naturals, TLC

CONSTANTS N
VARIABLES i, turn, wants


(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK == /\ turn \in 0..1
          /\ wants \in [0..1 -> BOOLEAN]

(* Initial state: nobody wants to enter CS, turn is arbitrary *)
Init == /\ turn \in 0..1
        /\ wants = [i \in 0..1 |-> FALSE]

(* Process i's attempt to enter critical section *)
Enter(i) ==
    /\ wants[i] = FALSE
    /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
    /\ UNCHANGED turn

(* Process i's exit from critical section *)
Exit(i) ==
    /\ wants[i] = TRUE
    /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]
    /\ turn' = 1 - i
    /\ UNCHANGED <<>>

(* Process i's busy wait *)
BusyWait(i) ==
    /\ wants[i] = TRUE
    /\ turn = 1 - i
    /\ UNCHANGED <<wants, turn>>

(* Next-state relation: either process i enters, exits, or busy waits *)
Next ==
    \/ \E i \in 0..1 : Enter(i)
    \/ \E i \in 0..1 : Exit(i)
    \/ \E i \in 0..1 : BusyWait(i)
    \/ /\ UNCHANGED <<turn, wants>> \* Termination disjunct

(* Safety invariant: mutual exclusion *)
MutualExclusion == \A i, j \in 0..1 : (i # j) => ~(wants[i] /\ wants[j])

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<turn, wants>> /\ TypeOK

name: Eventually Consistent Counter
generated_spec:
---- MODULE GCounter ----
EXTENDS Naturals, FiniteSets
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


CONSTANTS N, Node

VARIABLES counts, node

(* Type invariant: counts is a matrix of natural numbers *)
TypeOK == 
    /\ counts \in [Node -> [Node -> Nat]]
    /\ \A i \in Node: \A j \in Node: counts[i][j] \in Nat

(* Initial state: all counts are zero *)
Init == 
    /\ counts = [i \in Node |-> [j \in Node |-> 0]]

(* Increment action: a node increments its own slot *)
Increment(i) == 
    /\ i \in Node
    /\ counts' = [counts EXCEPT ![i][i] = @ + 1]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<>>

(* Merge action: a node merges its counts with another node's counts *)
Merge(i, j) == 
    /\ i \in Node
    /\ j \in Node
    /\ i # j
    /\ counts' = [counts EXCEPT ![i][k] = Max(counts[i][k], counts[j][k]) : k \in Node]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<>>

(* Termination disjunct to avoid deadlock *)
Terminating == UNCHANGED <<counts>>

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == 
    \E i \in Node: Increment(i)
    \/ \E i, j \in Node: Merge(i, j)
    \/ Terminating

(* Global count: sum of maximums over all nodes *)
GlobalCount == 
    \Sum n \in Node: \Max(\{counts[i][n] : i \in Node\})

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<counts>>
